overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring depicting a halo-adorned character exploring dark ancient stone ruins with floating debris overhead, transitioning through a narrow cliffside passage, leaping into a void, and arriving in a vibrant grassland dominated by a massive glowing golden tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined stone courtyard with scattered architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the ruined courtyard examining the surroundings

entered.detail: tall ancient stone walls with weathered surfaces surrounding the courtyard
leafless trees with bare branches scattered throughout the ruins
fallen stone archway lying tilted on the ground
cracked stone tiles covering the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open ruined courtyard surrounded by ancient stone walls and dead trees. The ground is covered in cracked stone pavement, and a collapsed archway lies in the distance. The atmosphere is dark and desaturated with red particles floating in the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined plaza with floating debris overhead

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal floating rocks and debris field in the sky
approaching entrance to narrow stone corridor between tall walls

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the floating debris field before continuing toward a narrow passage

entered.detail: large rocks and debris floating in the sky against bright backlight
massive vertical stone facade forming the edge of the structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the ruins as the camera tilts up to reveal a spectacular field of floating rocks and debris against a bright sky. The character approaches a narrow passage entrance between tall stone walls, leaving the open courtyard behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone passage between high walls

events.description: entering narrow enclosed corridor with walls on both sides
approaching brighter exit at end of dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage flanked by high stone walls and small red trees

entered.detail: tall stone walls forming a tight passage on the left side
tall stone walls forming a tight passage on the right side
ancient stone lantern with orange flame providing light
small trees with distinctive red foliage growing in the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed corridor between high stone walls, leaving the open sky behind. Small red-leafed trees and lit stone lanterns line the path as the character approaches a bright exit at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking void with white structure in distance

events.description: character approaches cliff edge and stops at the precipice
character jumps off the cliff into the void below
falling through clouds toward new landscape below

agents.ego_description: approaching the cliff edge and leaping into the void, falling through clouds toward a new area

entered.detail: sheer drop-off at the end of the stone path
large white glowing structure visible across the void
thick clouds and mist filling the chasm below

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character stands at a cliff edge overlooking a vast void with a mysterious white structure visible in the distance. After a brief pause, the character jumps off the cliff and falls through clouds toward a new landscape below.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland with massive glowing golden tree

events.description: landing in vibrant grassland with massive golden Erdtree and purple sky
environment shifts from dark desaturated ruins to bright vivid colors

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the massive glowing golden tree, now wearing a wide-brimmed hat and dark robes

entered.detail: massive tree with glowing golden leaves illuminating the landscape
tall green grass covering the ground
vibrant purple and blue cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The character lands in a vibrant grassland under a purple sky, dominated by a massive glowing golden Erdtree. The environment shifts dramatically from the dark ruins to bright vivid colors with tall grass and falling golden leaves as the character approaches the tree.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through desaturated ancient ruins that transition from an open, desolate courtyard into a confined, illuminated corridor. It begins with the character walking across cracked stone pavement surrounded by dead trees and floating red particles under a dark atmosphere. As the character moves forward, the camera tilts upward to reveal a vast field of floating rocks and debris against a bright sky before the path narrows toward a stone passage. The scene then shifts from the open air into an enclosed corridor of high stone walls, where the environment becomes more detailed with lit lanterns and small red-leafed trees. This progression continues along the guided path, finally drawing the camera toward a bright, glowing exit at the far end of the passage.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate cliffside overlooking a void into a vibrant, otherworldly grassland. It begins as the character emerges from a narrow passage to stand at a precipice, gazing across a vast emptiness toward a distant white structure. The perspective then plunges downward as the character leaps from the cliff, falling through a layer of clouds that masks the transition between worlds. As the character lands, the environment shifts dramatically from the dark ruins to a vivid landscape under a purple sky, filled with tall grass and drifting golden leaves. The scene finally opens up to reveal a massive, glowing golden Erdtree that dominates the horizon.
